summary: Phase B-1: Document Rendering Hardening - All features verified working. CanonicalDocumentRenderer successfully renders Quote, Invoice, and Delivery Note preview pages with settings-driven branding. Backend API /api/documents/render-settings returns unified settings. PDF export via html2canvas + jsPDF functional.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for UUID-format invoice IDs (only supports ObjectId lookup). Pre-existing issue, not related to Phase B-1.

issues: Invoice shows 'BILL TO' label which is correct for invoices (not 'PREPARED FOR' like quotes)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (Quote ID: 69d8ea175572c5cf0210281e, Invoice ID: 71c2fa9c-1eff-4cf2-a481-95df7f0b764e, Delivery Note ID: 69b7fef0389d82485bf03c70)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B-1 Document Rendering Hardening verified. CanonicalDocumentRenderer is working on all 3 document preview pages (Quote, Invoice, Delivery Note). Settings-driven branding pulls from /api/documents/render-settings endpoint.

details: Returns company_name, address, phone, email, TIN
Returns bank_name, bank_account_name, bank_account_number, bank_branch, swift_code
Returns logo_url, show_signature, cfo_name, cfo_title, cfo_signature_url
Returns doc_footer with show_address, show_email, show_phone, show_registration toggles
Returns doc_numbering with prefixes for quote, invoice, order, delivery_note, purchase_order, sku
Line items table with description, qty, unit price, total
Footer with address, email, phone visible
Payment summary card outside renderer (when applicable)
CanonicalDocumentRenderer renders with DELIVERY NOTE header
Delivery info card outside renderer (Delivered By, Delivered To, Delivery Address, Vehicle/Driver)
Quick Actions section with status change buttons
View button present for each delivery note
View button navigates to detail page
Download PDF button triggers html2canvas + jsPDF export
